8/4/97 DEPARTMENT #4 DOROTHY VON BEROLDINGEN, JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. C. GALLAGHER, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: CHARLES RAUSEO, ATTY. FOR PLTF. KAHRAMA TOLU, PLTF. DAVID LAWRENCE JONES SUED AS DAVID JOHN, DEFT. 9:55 A.M. C/C FOR CONTESTED COURT TRIAL. PLTF'S MOTIONS IN LIMINIE. PLTF. WAIVES OPENING STATEMENTS. PLTF'S. CASE IN CHIEF. PLTF'S WITNESS, KAHRAMA TOLU, SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF'S EXHIBIT, I.D./EVID. CROSS EXAMINATION OF PLTF'S WITNESS BY DEFT. IN PRO PER, DAVID LAWRENCE JONES. PLTF. RESTS. NO DIRECT EXAMINATION PUT FORWARD BY DEFENDANT AS THE MAJORITY OF DEFENSE TESTIMONY WAS BARRED BY DEFT'S FAILURE TO ANSWER THE FORM INTERROGATORIES PRESENTED TO HIM PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. BOTH SIDES STIPULATE TO THE SERVICE OF THE THREE DAY NOTICE ON DEFT ON 4/25/97 BY PERSONAL SERVICE. DEFENSE RESTS. FINAL ARGUMENT BY PLTF'S COUNSEL. NO FINAL ARGUMENT BY DEFENSE IN PRO PER. THE COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. PLTF. TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT. COURT ADJOURNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, DAVID AKA DAVID JOHN JONES, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 988 MARKET STREET SUITE M3 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,033.02 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,033.02, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH. COST GRANTED PER COST BILL.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, DAVID AKA DAVID JOHN
